title: Formulas, functional groups and the naming of organic compounds
summary: 9701 A Level organic — IUPAC naming, functional groups, and formula types with PhET molecule builder.
learningObjectives: Name organic compounds using IUPAC rules.
Identify major functional groups at A Level.
Convert between molecular, structural, and displayed formulae.
Classify alcohols, amines, and carbonyl compounds.

simpleExplanation.title: Naming and recognising groups
simpleExplanation.summary: IUPAC names follow longest chain, lowest locant, and suffix for the highest priority group.
steps: Primary vs secondary vs tertiary — count adjacent carbons.

sections.content: **Organic naming** (29.1) underpins all A Level organic papers. Practise **priority rules** when multiple groups present.
